summary: Full backend + frontend verification before Hostinger VPS deployment. Backend pytest suite extended to 52 tests (added Coordinator apply/admin approve-reject-delete coverage + extra admin route protection checks). All 52/52 PASS. Frontend Playwright runs verified: home (hero, mission images, lang toggle EN<->HI with localStorage persistence), /join coordinator form full submission -> success page with testid 'coordinator-success-page', /projects filter chips render and translate to Hindi, /contact form submits with success state, /admin/login flow advances to TOTP screen on valid credentials. All 36 home-page Unsplash images load (0 broken). Cleaned up TEST_-prefixed seed data.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py has grown to ~1050 lines — consider splitting into routers (auth, donations, projects, team, coordinators, contact, admin) before further feature growth.
CORS allow_origins defaults to '*' when CORS_ORIGINS env is unset; for VPS deployment set CORS_ORIGINS explicitly to the production domain to tighten security.

Razorpay client is conditionally constructed only when keys are present — endpoint correctly falls back to mock order id. Before VPS deploy with live keys, add a sanity test that signature verification rejects invalid signatures end-to-end.

Coordinator endpoints currently do NOT include any rate limiting on the public /api/coordinators/apply route. A single attacker email loop could be bypassed by changing email each request. Consider adding IP-based throttling before public launch.

send_thank_you_email and send_coordinator_*_email are fire-and-forget via asyncio.create_task — failure is logged only; this is per the request (mocked Resend), but ensure RESEND_API_KEY is set on VPS for actual delivery.
Admin TOTP secret is stored unencrypted in mongo; acceptable for a single-admin deploy but mention in deployment notes.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py (added TestCoordinatorApply, TestCoordinatorAdmin, TestAdminProtections; relaxed stale donation min-amount + team seed assertions to match current server.py)
seed_data_creation: All TEST_-prefixed records (coordinators/donations/contacts) created during this run were deleted at teardown. DB is left clean of test artifacts.
context_for_next_testing_agent: App is deploy-ready. Backend uses MongoDB via MONGO_URL+DB_NAME, JWT_SECRET, optional RESEND_API_KEY + RAZORPAY_KEY_ID/SECRET; on VPS, set these in backend/.env. CORS_ORIGINS should be set to the production domain. Frontend uses REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL only. Test data convention: prefix names with TEST_ and emails with test_ or playwright_ — these are auto-cleaned. The TOTP secret persists in db.admins; if QR is needed again, use POST /api/admin/reset-totp (auth required).
rca of the issue: No bug encountered. Two stale test assertions from iter4 (team seeded with 4 dummies + donation min amount 50) were updated to match current server.py (no team seed + donation min 10).
